Name: TEITOK - a Tokenized TEI environment
Description:
This is a web-based platform for viewing, creating, and editing corpora with both rich textual mark-up and linguistic annotation.
The tool, which is maintained by ÚFAL institute of Charles University (a CLARIAH-CZ/LINDAT node), is available from a dedicated webpage/Gitlab.

Name: ELAN
Description:
This is a desktop-based application for the creation, annotation, and analysis of complex multimedia data, enabling time-aligned transcription and linguistic analysis.
The tool is available for download from the Language Archive.

Name: WebAnno
Description:
This is a web-based collaborative tool for linguistic annotation that supports various annotation tasks, including POS tagging, dependency parsing, and coreference resolution. It provides collaborative features and works well with formats like CoNLL-U.
This tool is offered as a webservice for CLARIN-D members.

Name: TreeTagger - a part-of-speech tagger for many languages
Description:
This is a tool for annotating text with part-of-speech and lemma information.
The tool is available for download a dedicated webpage hosted by the Institute for Natural Language Processing, and through a graphical interface

Name: INCEpTION
Description:
This is a web-based application offering intelligent assistance and knowledge management.
The tool is available through online access through the CLARIN:EL infrastructure.

Name: FoLiA Linguistic Annotation Tool
Description:
This a web-based linguistic annotation environment based around the FoLiA format (http://proycon.github.io/folia), a rich XML-based format for linguistic annotation.
Flat allows users to view annotated FoLiA documents and enrich these documents with new annotations.
The tool is available from GitHub.

Name: ANNIS Search and Visualization System for Corpora
Description:
This is an open source, cross platform web browser-based search and visualization architecture for complex multilayer linguistic corpora with diverse types of annotation in, amongst others, syntax, semantics, morphology, prosody, referentiality, and lexis.
This tool uses a relational database format called the ANNIS import format. The Pepper converter framework allows users to convert data from various formats including PAULA XML, EXMARaLDA XML, TigerXML, CoNLL, RSTTool, generic XM L and TreeTagger directly into ANNIS.
The tool is available from a dedicated webpage.

Name: EXMARaLDA
Description:
This is a desktop-based application for working with spoken language corpora.
The application is available for download from a dedicated website.

Name: Q-CAT Corpus Annotation Tool 1.5
Description:
This is a tool for the manual annotation of corpora, which enables advanced queries performed on top of the annotations.
The tool supports, amongst other features, the CONLL-U format and working with Universal Dependency part-of-speech tags.
This is a desktop took that runs on Windows operating systems. It is available for download from the CLARIN.SI repository.

Name: TrEd
Description:
This desktop-based application is a fully customizable and programmable graphical editor and viewer for tree-like structures.
This tool is available for download from LINDAT.

Name: FLeX
Description:
This is a desktop-based application designed for documenting, analyzing, and managing lexical and textual data, particularly for under-documented languages.
The tool is available for download from a CLARIN-external website.
